---
title: "Glossary"
author: "UIAO Modernization Program"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
  pdf: default
  gfm: default
---

# Glossary of Terms

To ensure clarity across all levels of the agency, the following terms are defined as they pertain to the **uiao-core** Modernization Atlas.

| Term | Definition |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Appendix Canon** | The authoritative library of 104 standardized architectural patterns (A-CZ) used to eliminate configuration drift. |
| **Identity Plane** | The security layer where user identity (Azure AD) and device posture define network access rights. |
| **ISE (Identity Services Engine)** | The central policy server used to authenticate users and assign security tags. |
| **Micro-segmentation** | A security technique that isolates workloads from one another to prevent lateral movement by a threat actor. |
| **SDA (Software-Defined Access)** | The technology used to automate user access policy and simplify network provisioning. |
| **SGACL (Security Group ACL)** | The specific rules that permit or deny traffic based on Security Group Tags (SGTs). |
| **SGT (Scalable Group Tag)** | A metadata tag assigned to a user or device that represents its role (e.g., "Contractor" or "Admin"). |
| **uiao-core** | The internal project name for the agency's Unified Infrastructure Architecture & Operations initiative. |
| **VXLAN (Virtual Extensible LAN)** | The encapsulation protocol used to create a flexible, programmable network "Overlay." |
| **Zero-Trust** | A security framework requiring all users to be authenticated and authorized before being granted access to applications and data. |
